changes: Tab support — open multiple notes simultaneously with a tab bar; close tabs to return to list
Table insertion — toolbar button inserts a styled 3-column table
Paragraph focus mode — dims all blocks except the one the cursor is in
Research notes panel — collapsible scratch pad per note, persisted separately from content
Version timeline — snapshot panel now has a Timeline tab showing all snapshots as a scrubbable dot rail
Word export — Save To… dialog now includes .docx option (headings, bold/italic/lists/tables preserved)
Word import — Import dialog now accepts .docx files, converted to HTML via mammoth
Update changelog.json to include changes for version 0.1.1
Update version to 0.1.1 and implement changelog management
Add initial project structure for SignalPad app
